title: potentilla × vitodurensis
intro: Potentilla × vitodurensis, also known as the hybrid potentilla, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla nitida. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla × vitodurensis include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as having potential benefits in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Potentilla × vitodurensis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
